chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Criminal Miscellaneous Application No.S-604 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 23.09.2024 Mr. Deedar Hussain Solangi advocate along with applicant. Ms. Rameshan Oad, A.P.G. Respondent No.2 Syed Atta Muhammad having CNIC No.41304- 6422666-9 is present in person and submits that he has patched up with the applicant party and do not want to register FIR and has no objection if the impugned order is set-aside. In view of above, this Criminal Miscellaneous Application is allowed and the impugned order is set-aside. JUDGE
